description.value: Aura moderate transmutation; CL 6th; Weight 15 lbs.; Price 8,170 gp DESCRIPTION Three times per day, this +2 heavy steel shield can be commanded to transform into a +2 tower shield. It can stay in tower shield form for 1 minute or until it is commanded to take its normal form again (a swift action ). A collapsible tower’s weight does not change when it takes tower shield form. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Magic Arms and Armor; Spells shrink item; Cost 4,170 gp
